data.name: Lewd Delivery
data.detailed_description:
Lewd Delivery is a short novel about a guy who works as a food delivery driver. One Friday night, after delivering his last order, he meets a rich woman named Mrs. Jones, who needs help with her broken kitchen faucet.

After assisting her, she invites him to stay a little longer to share a meal as a way to thank him. Our hero agrees, and from that moment, his best weekend begins.

Enjoy a story full of romance and a relaxing atmosphere! Discover what kind of person Mrs. Jones is and see if it could turn into something serious...

FEATURES:

  • 1.5 hours of content

  • Original soundtrack

  • A relaxing atmosphere

data.short_description: Even a seemingly lousy courier job has its perks—sometimes you might just meet a rich, lonely woman!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
